## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes with no failures
- [ ] README and docs updated if applicable
- [ ] No internal dependencies introduced (geotask_runtime, geotask_domain_packs, patent_evidence, benchmarks)
- [ ] No network I/O added to Core
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private paths included
- [ ] Architecture boundaries respected (Core does not import Domain Packs or Runtime)
- [ ] Public Manifest and SHA-256 updated if files changed
